prompt: Listen carefully! Add ONE object — just one!
Just one — can you add a single object?
feedback: One! Just one object. Count it — one!

prompt: Add one more — how many will that make? Add another!
One more object — what number will we get to?
feedback: TWO! One… two. Count with me — one, two!
Two! One and one more makes two.

prompt: One more — can you add it?
feedback: THREE! One, two, three — count them all!

prompt: Two more to make FIVE! Add two more objects.
Can you get to five? Add two more!
feedback: FIVE! One, two, three, four, five — you counted to five!
failureFeedback: Keep adding — count as you go!

prompt: Now take some away — can you remove objects until you have THREE left?
Remove some — stop when you have three!
feedback: Three again! You took some away and knew when to stop — that's brilliant.
Three! You compared and got the right amount!
failureFeedback: Count what's left — do you have three yet?
Keep removing — or add some back!
